nasb.text: that Jeremiah went out from Jerusalem to go to the land of Benjamin in order to take possession of some property there among the people.

esv.text: Jeremiah set out from Jerusalem to go to the land of Benjamin to receive his portion there among the people.

cnv.text: 耶利米離開耶路撒冷，往便雅憫地去，要在那裡，在同鄉中間，取得自己的產業。

ccb.text: 耶利米起身离开耶路撒冷，前往便雅悯境内去接收他在同族中应得的地业。
